title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾为象征，强调自由和灵活性。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant
Any OS. Any Platform
The lobster way

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: Superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，强调实际有效性。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: affaan-m/ECC 是一个针对 Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor 等 AI 编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、直觉、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system.
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development.
For Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent

summary: NousResearch/hermes-agent 是一个能够随用户成长而进化的智能代理项目，托管在 GitHub 上。
highlights: The agent that grows with you

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills

summary: 一个基于Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱的观察而生成的CLAUDE.md文件，用于改善Claude Code的行为表现。
highlights: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior
derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

title: ultraworkers/claw-code

title: What Rose Petals Teach Us about Induction
summary: 文章通过玫瑰花瓣的比喻，探讨归纳推理的本质与局限性，强调经验观察在形成普遍规律中的作用及潜在谬误。
highlights: 玫瑰花瓣的排列模式揭示了归纳推理中从特殊到一般的跳跃
经验观察虽能指导预测，但无法保证绝对真理
归纳法的有效性依赖于背景假设和样本代表性

title: Two years of vector search at Notion: 10x scale, 1/10th cost
summary: Notion分享了其向量搜索系统两年来的演进，实现了10倍规模扩展和成本降低至原来的十分之一。
highlights: Two years of vector search at Notion: 10x scale, 1/10th cost
实现了10倍规模扩展和成本降低至原来的十分之一

title: Building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community
content: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia, with commitments to responsible energy, community investment, jobs, and access to Codex.
summary: OpenAI宣布在佐治亚州埃芬汉县启动Project Camellia项目，承诺负责任能源、社区投资、就业机会及Codex访问权限。
highlights: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia
commitments to responsible energy
community investment
jobs
access to Codex

title: How news organizations are using AI to advance their vital missions
content: News organizations are using AI to strengthen reporting, grow audiences, and improve business operations, with OpenAI tools supporting journalists and publishers worldwide.
summary: 新闻机构正在利用AI加强报道、扩大受众并改善业务运营，OpenAI工具为全球记者和出版商提供支持。
highlights: News organizations are using AI to strengthen reporting, grow audiences, and improve business operations
OpenAI tools supporting journalists and publishers worldwide

title: Bringing Nunchaku 4-bit Diffusion Inference to Diffusers
summary: 本文介绍了如何将Nunchaku的4位扩散推理集成到Diffusers库中，旨在提高扩散模型的推理效率并降低内存占用。
highlights: Bringing Nunchaku 4-bit Diffusion Inference to Diffusers
提高扩散模型的推理效率并降低内存占用

title: The State of Simulation for Physical AI: An Overview
summary: 本文概述了物理AI仿真的现状，探讨了仿真技术在训练和测试物理AI系统（如机器人、自动驾驶）中的关键作用，并分析了当前挑战与未来方向。
highlights: 物理AI仿真对于在安全、可控环境中训练和验证AI系统至关重要。
当前仿真面临真实感与计算效率之间的权衡挑战。
NVIDIA在推动物理AI仿真平台发展方面处于领先地位。
